title: Mera Dil Tere Liye
overview: Priya R. Singh, daughter of wealthy businessman Raghunath and housewife Savitri, falls in love with fellow student Vijay Verma despite initial clashes. Raghunath, however, wants her to marry Vikram, the U.S.-based son of his friend. Defying her father, Priya elopes with Vijay and arranges a temple wedding with the Principal’s help. But Raghunath stops it, declaring Priya underage. With just 15 days left to turn 18, Priya is unaware of her father’s plan to take her to the U.S. and force her into marriage with Vikram.
